expectations.text: Uses class X extends HTMLElement pattern
expectations.evidence: Uses IIFE pattern (function() { ... })() — no Web Components at all
No connectedCallback — uses event delegation via document.addEventListener instead
No disconnectedCallback — MutationObserver is never disconnected, event listeners are never cleaned up
Generic fetchJSON throws on !response.ok but no specific 422 handling — all errors treated the same
No Web Components — uses IIFE with loose functions
No shopify:section:load handler — drawer interactions break after section re-render in editor
